meaning: n.肯尼亚人adj.肯尼亚共和国(人)的
examples: The conditions may tilt the balance in favour of the Kenyan runners.
An adult male lion is resting in the grass on the Kenyan savanna.
Kenyan police officers near the border.
"This is a purely Kenyan effort ... finding African solutions to African problems, " Collymore said.
"It compromised the opportunity for the Kenyan authorities to proceed with investigations, " he said.
